languages.text: Лорд-капитан прибыл{mf||а} вовремя — Клеть, главное поселение мира, атаковано неизвестными врагами Человечества.
The Lord Captain has arrived just in time — the Cage, the world's main settlement, has been attacked by unknown enemies of Humanity.
languages.original_text: Лорд-капитан прибыл{mf||а} вовремя — Клеть, главное поселение мира, атаковано неизвестными врагами Человечества.

traits.locale_text: The Lord Captain has arrived just in time — the Cage, the world's main settlement, has been attacked by unknown enemies of Humanity.
The Lord Captain has arrived just in time — Tsar-Cage, the world's main settlement, has been attacked by unknown enemies of Humanity.
The Lord Captain has arrived just in time — Tsar-Cage, the world's main settlement, has been attacked by unknown enemies of Humanity.
The Lord Captain has arrived just in time — the Cage, the world's main settlement, has been attacked by unknown enemies of Humanity.

languages.text: ちょうどいいタイミングで、ロード・キャプテンが到着した。人類の主要な居住地であるツァー・ケージが、人類の敵である未知の者たちに襲撃されたのだ。
languages.original_text: The Lord Captain has arrived just in time — Tsar-Cage, the world's main settlement, has been attacked by unknown enemies of Humanity.

traits.locale_text: ちょうどいいタイミングで、ロード・キャプテンが到着した。人類の主要な居住地であるツァー・ケージが、人類の敵である未知の者たちに襲撃されたのだ。

languages.text: {mf|El|La} Lord Capitán llega justo a tiempo. La Jaula, el principal asentamiento del planeta, ha sido atacado por enemigos de la Humanidad no identificados.
languages.original_text: The Lord Captain has arrived just in time — the Cage, the world's main settlement, has been attacked by unknown enemies of Humanity.

traits.locale_text: {mf|El|La} Lord Capitán llega justo a tiempo. La Jaula, el principal asentamiento del planeta, ha sido atacado por enemigos de la Humanidad no identificados.

languages.text: Der Lord Captain ist gerade rechtzeitig eingetroffen ... der Käfig, die wichtigste Siedlung der Welt, wurde von unbekannten Feinden der Menschheit angegriffen.
languages.original_text: The Lord Captain has arrived just in time — the Cage, the world's main settlement, has been attacked by unknown enemies of Humanity.

traits.locale_text: Der Lord Captain ist gerade rechtzeitig eingetroffen ... der Käfig, die wichtigste Siedlung der Welt, wurde von unbekannten Feinden der Menschheit angegriffen.

languages.text: {mf|Le seigneur-capitaine|La seigneure-capitaine} est {mf|arrivé|arrivée} à point nommé. La Cage, la principale colonie de la planète, vient d'être attaquée par des ennemis de l'humanité jusqu'ici inconnus.
languages.original_text: The Lord Captain has arrived just in time — the Cage, the world's main settlement, has been attacked by unknown enemies of Humanity.

traits.locale_text: {mf|Le seigneur-capitaine|La seigneure-capitaine} est {mf|arrivé|arrivée} à point nommé. La Cage, la principale colonie de la planète, vient d'être attaquée par des ennemis de l'humanité jusqu'ici inconnus.

languages.text: 舰长大人来得正是时候——该行星的主要定居点“牢笼”正遭到人类未知之敌的突袭。
languages.original_text: The Lord Captain has arrived just in time — the Cage, the world's main settlement, has been attacked by unknown enemies of Humanity.

traits.locale_text: 舰长大人来得正是时候——该行星的主要定居点“牢笼”正遭到人类未知之敌的突袭。

languages.text: Lord Kaptan tam zamanında yetişti. Dünyanın ana yerleşimi olan Kafes, İnsanlığın bilinmeyen düşmanlarının saldırısına uğradı.
languages.original_text: The Lord Captain has arrived just in time — the Cage, the world's main settlement, has been attacked by unknown enemies of Humanity.

traits.locale_text: Lord Kaptan tam zamanında yetişti. Dünyanın ana yerleşimi olan Kafes, İnsanlığın bilinmeyen düşmanlarının saldırısına uğradı.
